living-abstract.essence: Dialectic review — structured critique and repair that closes the gap between intent and artifact
living-abstract.purpose: Stress-test load-bearing artifacts through fresh-context scrutiny, producing proven work from good work
living-abstract.capacity: Fresh-eyes battlefield review with practical tests designed for the artifact type
Surgical synthesis that applies all findings in one pass, leaving no seams
Fresh-eyes final scrutiny with binary PASS/FAIL gate
Craft practical tests specific to the artifact's consumers and use cases
living-abstract.principle: Critique phases use fresh heads — the power comes from reading what IS, not what was meant
Test against reality, not aesthetics — "does it work in the field?" not "is it elegant?"
Tell the head WHAT to examine, not HOW to think — fresh judgment is the point
Reserve for load-bearing artifacts — overkill for scratch work, essential for foundations
After repair, the artifact reads as if it was always this way — no patches, no review residue
